parameters.message: ={{ (() => { const name = $json.Name.split(' ')[0]; const mo = $json.sendMonth; if (mo === 6) return 'Hey ' + name + '! It\'s been 6 months since your last service at Redemption Collision. Stop in for a free multi-point inspection — no appointment needed. (346) 471-5322, Humble TX'; return 'Hi ' + name + ', it\'s been a year since we serviced your vehicle at Redemption Collision. We\'d love to see you again! Free estimates always. (346) 471-5322'; })() }}

_setup_notes.sheet_structure: Create a Google Sheet named 'PastCustomers' with columns: Name | Phone | Vehicle | ServiceDate | ServiceType | Sent6Month | Sent12Month
_setup_notes.sheet_defaults: Sent6Month and Sent12Month default = FALSE. ServiceDate format = YYYY-MM-DD
_setup_notes.usage: Add a row every time a customer picks up their car. That's it — automation handles the rest.
_setup_notes.same_sheet_id: Can use the same Google Sheet file as Automation C — just add a second tab named PastCustomers
